test_command: cd apps/web && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test + agent-browser AC-5/6/7
notes: AC-1..8 all pass. Selected state card renders with glass-card border-primary/40 bg-primary/5, emoji text-3xl, '已选择:美业', keywords '美容院、美发、美甲、美睫、纹绣'. CTA uses bg-gradient-to-r from-primary to-primary/80 hover:from-primary/90 hover:to-primary/70, no violet/amber/gold. Disabled state shows STEP1_CTA_DISABLED_HINT. handleSubmit sets localStorage acc_step1 and navigates /step/3. Browser verified: click '💅美业' → state card appears (AC-5); CTA click → URL becomes /step/3 (AC-6); localStorage acc_step1 industry='beauty' (AC-7). Typecheck exit 0. Vitest 70 tests pass (8 files).
